_publications._publicationTitle: Exploring transcriptional regulators Ref-1 and STAT3 as therapeutic targets in malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumours.

_contextSnippet: The MPNST samples had a range of Ref-1 expression with significantly more Ref-1 expression than PN or ANNUBP
details: Successfully detected Ref-1 expression in PN, ANNUBP and MPNST patient samples by IHC, showing significantly more Ref-1 expression in MPNST samples than PN or ANNUBP
